finding: A concurrently active captain landed ATM-GOV-0150/0151 changes while TASK-RFT-0044 had uncommitted extracted source files, causing the RFT worktree changes to disappear and later blocking TASK-RFT-0044 close because the claimed ATM-GOV-0151 lane introduced repository-wide typecheck failures.
expectedBehavior: ATM should warn or fail closed when another active captain is about to commit/close while the shared worktree contains uncommitted changes owned by a different active task, and it should surface claimed-task validator failures as explicit cross-task blockers with owner/session identity.
evidenceOrRepro: During TASK-RFT-0044 on 2026-07-15, HEAD advanced to 08ecde66d (ATM-GOV-0150 close) while uncommitted broker-observability/runtime-governance extraction files were present; afterwards `npm run typecheck` failed in packages/core/src/broker/generated-projection-steward.ts, but ATM-GOV-0151 was already claimed by codex-gpt-5-5-captain.
followUp: Add a shared-worktree active-task dirty guard and cross-task validator-blocker report that includes owner actor/session/key, plus guidance for safe handoff or takeover before another captain commits or closes.
